etymology.description: ŤÄí(ŤÄí) (lńõi, "tilling tool") + Á¶ļ(Á¶ļ) (y√ļ, "ape") = paired working in the fields -> to pair
etymology.interpretation: The character ŤÄ¶(ŤÄ¶) combines the semantic component ŤÄí(ŤÄí) (lńõi, "tilling tool") signifying agriculture, with the phonetic component Á¶ļ(Á¶ļ) (y√ļ, "ape") to convey the concept of pairing, as in working together in the fields.
